name: @fintech-portfolio/icons
description: Clearline design system icon registry — 45 named glyphs rendered by a single tree-shakeable <Icon name /> component. Generated from icons.source.json (a copy of clearline-icons.json).

metadata.regenerate: Edit icons.source.json, then run `pnpm --filter @fintech-portfolio/icons generate` to rebuild src/icon-registry.ts.
